title: GRAVITAS
body:
Gravitas introduces different gravity and fall damage for each dimension.



The End is low-gravity with 50% fall damage, making precise movements difficult, but allowing for spectacular elytra flight .

The Nether is slightly higher gravity than the overworld, with 25% more fall damage. In high gravity soul sand acts like quicksand and doesnt allow you to jump up a block.

From an upcoming datapack project.
